headline: Jim Cramer on First Solar: “We Gotta Wait Another Quarter for That One”
summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar. When a caller inquired about the stock during the lightning round, Cramer remarked: That was a really bad quarter… I know… I shouldn’t be so shortsighted, but I mean, that was one awful quarter. We gotta wait another quarter for that one. […]

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on First Solar, Lowers Price Target to $212
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $241 to $212.

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider First Solar (FSLR) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether First Solar is still good value after its run over the years, this article will help you make sense of where the stock sits on the valuation spectrum today. The share price closed at US$197.27, with a 7 day return of 6.1% decline, a 30 day return of 14.4% decline, a year to date return of 28.1% decline, a 1 year return of 50.7%, a 3 year return of 8% decline and a 5 year return of 160.5%. Recent coverage has focused on First Solar's role within the broader...

headline: First Solar Expands US Manufacturing Footprint And Tests Long Term Demand
summary: First Solar commissioned a new factory in Louisiana and outlined plans for an additional facility in South Carolina. The expansion adds to the company’s US manufacturing footprint and comes as solar supply chains and policy remain in focus. For investors watching NasdaqGS:FSLR, the fresh US capacity comes with the stock trading around $197.27. The shares are up 50.7% over the past year and 160.5% over five years. A year-to-date return of negative 28.1% and a 14.4% decline over the past...
